content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 25, 2026, focused on a major transition of the ElizaOS ecosystem to Gemma 4 model defaults, significant hardening of the local inference and voice pipelines, and a comprehensive build-system audit to improve type safety and CI performance.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Gemma 4 Model Migration
*   Standardized RL, training, and local inference defaults across the framework to Gemma 4 (E2B, E4B, 12B, 31B tiers), replacing legacy Qwen-based configurations.
*   Updated registry entries, trajectory targets, and cloud launcher defaults to align with the new Gemma-based Eliza-1 release tiers.
*   Relevant PRs: [#9742](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9742), [#9740](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9740), [#9734](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9734), [#9707](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9707), [#9701](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9701).

### Voice & Acoustic Pipeline Hardening
*   Implemented real-time Acoustic Echo Cancellation (AEC) primitives, including playback-to-mic delay calibration and echo-reference alignment buffers.
*   Enabled functional Kokoro TTS speech synthesis and integrated ASR/WER correctness gates to prevent inaudible noise output.
*   Relevant PRs: [#9633](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9633), [#9596](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9596), [#9586](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9586), [#9575](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9575), [#9738](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9738).

### Build System & Type Safety Ratchet
*   Executed a multi-phase audit to enforce real type-checking across all plugins, eliminating `--noCheck` opt-outs and reducing unsafe `as unknown as` casts.
*   Optimized Turbo build caching by scoping generic build inputs and implemented per-package `knip` verification to identify and remove dead code.
*   Relevant PRs: [#9626](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9626), [#9708](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9708), [#9627](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9627), [#9728](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9728).

### Computer Use & Vision Enhancements
*   Added ffmpeg `x11grab` as a Linux screenshot fallback and integrated Wayland portal support.
*   Hardened Windows-based OCR and PowerShell hosts against cold-spawn latency and resource leaks.
*   Relevant PRs: [#9712](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9712), [#9659](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9659), [#9615](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9615), [#9651](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9651).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#9744](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9744): Fixes red failure-writeback test.
*   [#9698](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9698): UI Story Gate greening.
*   [#9696](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9696), [#9695](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9695), [#9688](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9688): Vision pipeline backpressure and memory management improvements.
*   [#9692](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9692): Fixes Storybook crash via TranslationProvider.
*   [#9691](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9691): Cloud headscale pre-auth TTL configuration.
*   [#9664](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9664): Idempotent tenant-db provisioning.
*   [#9663](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9663): Add buildAccessContext primitive.
*   [#9638](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9638): Typecheck hardening for 5 plugins.
*   [#9629](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9629): Turbo build input scoping.
*   [#9606](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9606): Model lookup debug logging.
*   [#9605](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9605): Runtime shutdown wait capping.
*   [#9604](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9604): Media attachment delivery hardening.
*   [#9603](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9603), [#9602](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9602): Voice AEC and echoReference provider wiring.
*   [#9564](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9564): Showcase app deployment parity.
*   [#9561](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9561): Fitbit distance normalization fix.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No specific issues were marked as closed in the provided activity log.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   *No new issues were opened in the provided activity log.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with >3 comments were identified in the provided activity log.*
